examples: Heirloom seeds come from plants that were traditionally grown in human populations, as opposed to the seeds used for large-scale agricultural production.
This year, she's planning to plant rare heirloom vegetables that you can't get in the store.
This is especially true with heirloom varieties, which are cultivated for taste over appearance.
Last year, the Gettles visited Italy, Spain, Thailand, Myanmar and Oman looking for heirloom seeds.
It might even be passed on to someone you hold dear and become an heirloom.
